extra.independence: Selection is CM-independent: loci were detected by Vitreschak 2008's hand-built sequence+structure descriptor + synteny, not the Rfam RF00230 CM at its GA cutoff (the GATE-1 cmsearch baseline), so the anchor can include loci below that cutoff. Sequence is corpus-independent: each leader is re-derived from its primary NCBI RefSeq genome, not the TBDB training table. Ascertainment ceiling (disclosed): both the CM and Vitreschak's descriptor rest on the same conserved T-box consensus, so arm (c) reaches the RF00230-cutoff-invisible-but-consensus-detectable region, not the all-consensus-invisible region (reached only by arm (b) synthetic divergence + the §13 discovery campaign).

source.citation: Vitreschak AG, Mironov AA, Lyubetsky VA, Gelfand MS. Comparative genomic analysis of T-box regulatory systems in bacteria. RNA 2008;14(4):717-735.
